title: MCP Servers: Teaching AI to Use the Internet Like Humans
title_zh: MCP服务器：教人工智能像人类一样使用互联网
full_text: If your MCP server has dozens of tools, it’s probably built wrong.You need tools that are specific and clear for each use case—but you also can’t have too many. This creates an almost impossible tradeoff that most companies don’t know how to solve.That’s why we interviewed Alex Rattray, the founder and CEO of Stainless. Stainless builds APIs, SDKs, and MCP servers for companies like OpenAI and Anthropic. Alex has spent years mastering how to make software talk to software, and he came on the sho

If your MCP server has dozens of tools, it’s probably built wrong.
You need tools that are specific and clear for each use case—but you also can’t have too many.
This creates an almost impossible tradeoff that most companies don’t know how to solve.
That’s why we interviewed Alex Rattray, the founder and CEO of Stainless.
Stainless builds APIs, SDKs, and MCP servers for companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.

## clean_text

If your MCP server has dozens of tools, it’s probably built wrong.You need tools that are specific and clear for each use case—but you also can’t have too many. This creates an almost impossible tradeoff that most companies don’t know how to solve.That’s why we interviewed Alex Rattray, the founder and CEO of Stainless. Stainless builds APIs, SDKs, and MCP servers for companies like OpenAI and Anthropic. Alex has spent years mastering how to make software talk to software, and he came on the sho
